race.comment: MURPHILLY (9) returned from a four-month spell with a gutsy win over 1400m at Hawkesbury last start. Second-up form is not flattering but her mile form is. Back in good shape and deserves the benefit of the doubt. MONKHANA (3) ran a couple of nice races at Rosehill and Gosford before tiring over 1700m at Scone most recently. In the right race to return to form. ROTHROCK (4) is back in trip but absolutely flying at present and must be included in calculations. UNREAL EXPECTATION (11) is race fit now and has better prospects back at the provincials.
